file_insights.purpose: Factory function for creating LLM provider instances
key_components: create_provider() function with provider_name and api_key parameters
_PROVIDERS registry mapping provider names to classes
ValueError with helpful error message including available providers

file_insights.changes: Added imports and exports for factory function and provider classes

patterns_discovered.description: Centralized provider instantiation using a factory function with string-based lookup
patterns_discovered.implementation: _PROVIDERS dictionary maps provider names to class types

patterns_discovered.description: Dictionary-based registry maintaining mapping between provider names and provider classes
ValueError includes list of available providers in error message
Provider classes imported and registered at module load time
patterns_discovered.benefit: Providers available immediately without explicit registration

gotchas_discovered.detail: Uses dict[str, type[LLMProvider]] which requires Python 3.9+
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure project minimum Python version is 3.9+

gotchas_discovered.detail: Provider names are case-sensitive; no validation for uppercase variants
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could lead to user confusion if 'Gemini' provided instead of 'gemini'

gotchas_discovered.detail: Provider registry is hardcoded; adding new providers requires code modification
gotchas_discovered.impact: Less flexible than dynamic registration approach

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully implemented factory pattern for LLM provider creation with clear error handling and modular exports

recommendations.recommendation: Add unit tests for factory function including: valid provider creation, unknown provider ValueError, error message content verification
Consider case-insensitive provider name matching or validate/normalize input
Document how new providers should be added to the factory (current approach requires code modification)
Consider adding provider introspection method (e.g., list_providers()) for runtime provider discovery
